hero.title: Let us find the right option for your clinic.
hero.description: Our team is here to help you with prices, technical help, stock info, and great service for your workplace.

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: Tell us what you need and our team will get back to you with a price quote or the help you need.
form.messagePlaceholder: How can we help you today?

success.title: Information sent!
success.description: Thank you for writing to us. Our team will read your message and reply very soon.

errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while sending your info.

whyChooseUs.title: Where great service gives you confidence
whyChooseUs.description1: In the health sector, there is no room for mistakes. Every material, tool, and product used directly affects patient recovery, efficiency, and medical results.
whyChooseUs.description2: We are a team focused on selling clinical and medical tools, working to give safe choices that fit well in hospitals, clinics, and doctor offices.
whyChooseUs.description3: Our goal is much more than just selling: we want to be a trusted support for our buyers, making their daily work easier with high-quality products.

hero.badge: Certification that proves the quality of our products
hero.title: Certification that proves the quality of our products
hero.description1: We work as suppliers dedicated to selling hospital and medical items, chosen under strict rules of durability and performance.
hero.description2: We know how important it is to have safe tools in emergencies where time is vital. For this reason, we base our work on:

strategicPartner.title: More than just a vendor, we want to be your trusted partner.
strategicPartner.description1: Why choose us: Very few companies understand the needs of the medical field. We really do.
strategicPartner.description2: Careful selection of tools: We only sell items that meet all safety and health rules.
strategicPartner.description3: Focus on fast delivery: We improve our shipping paths so you get your orders right on time.
strategicPartner.description4: Quick support response: We understand medical emergencies. We act fast and effectively.
strategicPartner.description5: Trust and consistency: We build long-term relationships based on honesty and good quality.

results.title: We focus on your goals, not just making sales
results.description1: We understand that clinics do not just buy tools, but the peace of mind that their facility will run smoothly, without stops and safely.
results.description2: For this reason, our service aims to provide real benefits:

items.item2: Better control of your internal stock
items.item3: Total certainty in your supply supply
items.item4: Full confidence in every order you make

results.description3: We line up with your daily goals to be a partner that adds real value, differing from a standard supplier.

contact.title: We are ready to assist you
contact.description1: If you are looking for a serious supplier with good technical knowledge and fast shipping, you are in the right place.
contact.description2: Dedicated phone line for price quotes, general questions, and orders.

hero.title: Special Quotes and Payments Page
hero.description: Please use this section only if you have a reference code given by a Zenvia agent.

authorized.title: Special Agreement Approved
authorized.description: The prices entered here must match exactly the final total price you agreed on with your agent.

errors.quoteRequired: It is necessary to enter the quote code given by your advisor.

hero.title: Where expert service builds trust
hero.description: We are a company focused on selling medical and hospital items, approved through strict quality and performance tests.

products.title: Quality proven in every item

contact.title: We are ready to help you
contact.description: If you need a serious distributor with technical knowledge and fast delivery times, you can rely on us.
contact.phoneDescription: Direct phone line to ask for prices, guidance, and post-sale support.

features.title: The tools we offer you
features.description: We have a catalog made to cover the different needs in daily medical work.
features.subtitle: Our supplies focus on:
items: Supporting health tasks and daily organization
Ensuring clean, safe, and monitoring conditions
Making the work of doctors and nurses faster
Improving reaction times and patient care
features.footer: Every item is built to fit easily into your daily work routines.
